Description: You may play 2 Custom Catcher cards at once. • If you played 1 card, draw cards until you have 3 cards in your hand. • If you played 2 cards, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with their Active Pokémon. (This effect works one time for 2 cards. )

Name: Electropower
Description: During this turn, your [L] Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Electropower
Description: During this turn, your [L] Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Faba
Description: Choose a Pokémon Tool or Special Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon, or any Stadium card in play, and put it in the Lost Zone.

Name: Fairy Charm Grass
Description: Prevent all damage done to the [Y] Pokémon this card is attached to by attacks from your opponent's [G] Pokémon-GX and [G] Pokémon-EX.

Name: Fairy Charm Psychic
Description: Prevent all damage done to the [Y] Pokémon this card is attached to by attacks from your opponent's [P] Pokémon-GX and [P] Pokémon-EX.

Name: Fairy Charm Fighting
Description: Prevent all damage done to the [Y] Pokémon this card is attached to by attacks from your opponent's [F] Pokémon-GX and [F] Pokémon-EX.

Name: Fairy Charm Dragon
Description: Prevent all damage done to the [Y] Pokémon this card is attached to by attacks from your opponent's [N] Pokémon-GX and [N] Pokémon-EX.

Name: Heat Factory ♢
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard a [R] Energy card from their hand. If they do, they draw 3 cards. Whenever any player plays an Item or Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to this Stadium card.

Name: Kahili
Description: Draw 2 cards. Then, flip a coin. If heads, if you played this Kahili from your hand, put this card into your hand instead of the discard pile. If you have no cards in your deck, you can't play this card.

Name: Life Forest ♢
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may heal 60 damage and remove all Special Conditions from 1 of their [G] Pokémon. Whenever any player plays an Item or Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to this Stadium card.

Name: Lost Blender
Description: Put 2 cards from your hand in the Lost Zone. If you do, draw a card.

Name: Lusamine ♢
Description: You can play this card only if your opponent has exactly 3 Prize cards remaining. Prevent all damage done to your Ultra Beasts by attacks during your opponent's next turn.

Name: Mina
Description: Search your deck for a [Y] Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Mixed Herbs
Description: You may play 2 Mixed Herbs cards at once. • If you played 1 card, remove a Special Condition from your Active Pokémon. • If you played 2 cards, heal 90 damage and remove all Special Conditions from your Active Pokémon. (This effect works one time for 2 cards. )

Name: Moomoo Milk
Description: Choose 1 of your Pokémon, and then flip 2 coins. For each heads, heal 30 damage from that Pokémon.

Name: Morty
Description: You can play this card only if 1 of your [P] Pokémon was Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn. Your opponent reveals their hand. Choose 2 cards you find there. Your opponent shuffles those cards into their deck.

Name: Net Ball
Description: Search your deck for a Basic [G] Pokémon or a [G] Energy card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Net Ball
Description: Search your deck for a Basic [G] Pokémon or a [G] Energy card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Professor Elm's Lecture
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon with 60 HP or less, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Professor Elm's Lecture
Description: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon with 60 HP or less, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Sightseer
Description: You may discard any number of cards from your hand. Then, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If you can't draw any cards in this way, you can't play this card.

Name: Sightseer
Description: You may discard any number of cards from your hand. Then, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If you can't draw any cards in this way, you can't play this card.

Name: Spell Tag
Description: When the [P] Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack, put 4 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

Name: Thunder Mountain ♢
Description: The attacks of [L] Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) cost [L] less. Whenever any player plays an Item or Supporter card from their hand, prevent all effects of that card done to this Stadium card.

Name: Wait and See Hammer
Description: You can use this card only if you go second, and only on your first turn. Discard an Energy from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

Name: Whitney
Description: Draw a card. Then, draw 2 cards for each other Whitney in your discard pile.

Name: Memory Energy
Description: This card provides [C] Energy. The Pokémon this card is attached to can use any attack from its previous Evolutions. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack. )

Name: Shuckle-GX
Ability-Effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that have 2 or fewer Energy attached to them.
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 3 damage counters instead of 1 on that Pokémon between turns.
Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Sceptile-GX
Effects: Discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Move a [G] Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Heal all damage from each of your Pokémon that has any [G] Energy attached to it. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Virizion-GX
Effects: Draw 2 cards.
If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 80 more damage.
Put any number of your Pokémon in play and all cards attached to them into your hand. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Magcargo-GX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard the top card of your deck. If it's a basic Energy card, attach it to 1 of your Pokémon.
Effects: Discard any amount of basic Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 50 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.
Discard the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Blacephalon-GX
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned and Confused.
Put any amount of [R] Energy attached to your Pokémon in the Lost Zone. This attack does 50 damage for each card put in the Lost Zone in this way.
Discard 1 of your Prize cards. If it's an Energy card, attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Suicune-GX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may shuffle it and all cards attached to it into your deck.
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon's attacks do 30 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Zeraora-GX
Ability-Effect: Each of your Pokémon that has any [L] Energy attached to it has no Retreat Cost.
Effects: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.
Attach 5 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to your Pokémon in any way you like. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Sigilyph-GX
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon-GX or Pokémon-EX (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon equal to the damage done to this Pokémon.
Effects: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
This attack does 60 damage times the amount of Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Tyranitar-GX
Ability-Effect: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from this Pokémon's attacks, put that Pokémon and all cards attached to it in the Lost Zone instead of the discard pile.
Effects: This attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Genesect-GX
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon may have up to 2 Pokémon Tool cards attached to it. If it loses this Ability, discard Pokémon Tool cards from it until only 1 remains.
Effects: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Alolan Ninetales-GX
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 2 Item cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Effects: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an Ultra Beast, it is Knocked Out. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mimikyu-GX
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
This attack does 30 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. Your opponent shuffles that Pokémon and all cards attached to it into their deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Lugia-GX
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage times the amount of Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
This Pokémon can't use Pelagic Blade during your next turn.
Put your opponent's Active Pokémon and all cards attached to it in the Lost Zone. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Description: Choose a Pokémon Tool or Special Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon, or any Stadium card in play, and put it in the Lost Zone.

Name: Judge
Description: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.
